feed.title: Eduardo's Engineering & Automation Portfolio
feed.subtitle: Showcasing automotive optimization, continuous learning, and software automation
feed.author: Eduardo

entry.title: Bachelor Thesis at BMW Group
entry.summary: Developed and implemented process optimization algorithms within the production plant, improving operational efficiency and data tracking.

entry.title: Career Essentials in GitHub Professional Certificate
entry.summary: Completed advanced training on GitHub Actions, automation pipelines, and containerized workflows via LinkedIn Learning.

entry.title: Automated Data Pipeline Project
entry.summary: Built a custom data processing factory using Python and Docker to dynamically generate web-syndicated portfolios from structured text files.
